narrative:
Union  Twp township has 34,702 registered voters, with 58.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.3 percentage points.
